chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Bail Application No.D-04 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.326/2024 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA No.327/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2024 Mr. Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Shar, advocate for applicant/accused a/w applicant/accused. = 1 Urgency granted. 2 Deferred. 3 Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4 The applicant through instant bail application seek protective bail in Crime No.33/2023 of Police Station Shadi Palli, registered for offences U/S 365-A, 342, 394, 337-H(ii), PPC r/w section 6/7 A.T. Act, 1997. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused has re-iterated the grounds as mentioned in the instant bail application and prayed for grant of protective bail to the applicant/accused. Since the applicant/accused intend to appear before the trial Court/Anti-Terrorism Court, Mirpurkhas, for the purpose of seeking pre- arrest bail, hence without touching the merit and de-merit of the case, protective bail for a period of 07 days from today is granted to the applicant/accused subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 18-03-2024 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the learned trial court, whichever is earlier. The application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Saleem*
